subject: feat(theme): add form theme system with color picker, font selector, and CSS variable architecture
body:
Forms now support customizable accent color and font family. The theme editor
appears in the right panel when no field is selected, with a color picker (+ hex
input) and curated font dropdown. CSS variables (--form-primary, --form-primary-light)
propagate the chosen color to all field components — focus rings, selected
radio/checkbox borders, and native checkbox/radio accent colors all respond to
the theme.

Tags: theme, ui, builder, renderer, css-variables
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
